name: Cucumber-Onion Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Onions, thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Alternate layers of cucumbers and onions in a deep, 2 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Sprinkle each layer with flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Pour catsup over all.
3. Place chunks of butter on top.
4. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 15 minutes or until onions are tender.
